meaning: n.专有者,私用者,占用者,擅用者
examples: Verily, an appropriator of all values must such bestowing love become; but healthy and holy, call I this selfishness.
Not entirely so, says CAGW's Williams: "It really is amazing--when the earmarks break down, it breaks down along who's an appropriator and who isn't, " not simply along party lines.
